subcodes.title: Words to E.J. Rosenberg et al, spoken around Feb. 1901
subcodes.first_line: Good people are of two kinds - those who are so by natural goodness of heart, and those who attain to it by an after gift of the Spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
